plant.description: Highly recommended in standard Ayurvedic texts for Vata diseases.

method_1.method: Strong decoction taken with castor oil (Eranda).

medicinal_uses: Used specifically for Vata-dominant joint pain and stiffness.
Assists in treating diseases of the nervous system.

safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
